title: Implement synchronized_hop_channel(sfn, seed=0, num_channels=8) matching ccp16-hop.json and SelectChannel pseudocode
description: Add to python/src/lichen/sim/tdma.py (or simulation.py/protocol.py). Use the new hash_32. Must produce identical output to vectors for SFN wrap, rendezvous. Update references in medium.py/node.py/simulation.py. See spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:2a.3.1
